description: HTML regeneration — applies specific user feedback or technical fixes to existing HTML code.

prompts.instruction:
<Revision_Task>
Apply the User Feedback to the provided HTML code. You must perform a surgical update, modifying only the requested sections while keeping the rest of the code structure verbatim.
</Revision_Task>

<Original_HTML>
{original_html}
</Original_HTML>

<User_Feedback>
{user_feedback}
</User_Feedback>

<Rules>
1. Maintain all table-based layouts and inline CSS styling.
2. Ensure all <a> tags remain valid and clickable.
3. Do NOT add triple backticks or 'Here is your update' text to the output.
</Rules>

Return the fully revised HTML code now.
